title: Sajtmaskin control-plane registry
description: Self-describing schema for config/control-plane/schema-registry.json and policy-registry.json. Each registry maps a schema/policy/rule/runtime-authority to its source of truth, validator, CI status, runtime-enforcement status, backoffice surface and mobility. Source-of-truth: config/control-plane/README.md.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier within the registry.

sourceOfTruth.description: Repo-relative path to the authoritative file. May be a glob (contains '*') or a 'path#fragment' reference into a JSON file.

validator.description: npm script name that validates this entry (e.g. 'db:schema-drift'), or null when none.

ciStatus.description: How CI treats it: hard blocks, warn is non-blocking, manual is run by hand, none has no CI.

runtimeEnforced.description: Whether the app actually reads/enforces this at runtime.

runtimeStatus.description: wired = a runtime read-path consumes it; declared-only = present/validated but NOT wired to runtime; n/a = not a runtime concern.

surface.description: Backoffice page/section that exposes it, or null.

editable.description: Whether Backoffice lets a human edit it.

writePath.description: File Backoffice writes to, or null.

danger.description: Blast radius of a bad edit.

mobility.description: Whether the file can be physically moved. leave = do not move (tooling/runtime expects the path).

notes.description: Free-form note. Required non-empty when runtimeEnforced is false (explain why it is not a runtime read-path).
